docs.title: Optimal Living Systems — Documentation
docs.text: OLS is a mutual aid nonprofit building open-source AI infrastructure for communities. This site is the central knowledge base for everyone who works on, collaborates with, or wants to understand the OLS ecosystem — from new volunteers joining their first sprint to external organizations exploring our published frameworks.

docs.title: Find what you need in 30 seconds
docs.text:
I'm new to OLSI'm on the OLS teamI'm visiting from outside OLS

Welcome. Start here — in this order:

  1. Read the mission and values — understand what we are building and why
  2. Read your role profile — understand what your contribution looks like
  3. Complete the onboarding guide — set up your tools and make your first contribution

New volunteer? Start with the onboarding guide.

It takes about two hours and gets you from zero to your first contribution.

Jump directly to what you need:

I need to... Go to... Work on a pipeline Infrastructure → Pipelines Work on a project (AI Lab, Research Lab) Projects Find a process or how-to guide Guides Look up a tool or system Infrastructure → Tools Find a team member or role Team Review or log a decision Decisions Check the roadmap Roadmap Add or edit a doc How to contribute

OLS publishes our frameworks, research, and methodology publicly. Good starting points:

  • What OLS is building — mission, vision, and projects overview
  • AI Lab — what the AI Lab does and why
  • Research Lab — open science research
  • How to collaborate with OLS — partnership and adoption

docs.title: What OLS is building
docs.text: Project What it does Status HBoK Holistic personal knowledge representation with privacy sovereignty Active OVNN Multi-output value scoring across ecological and psychological dimensions Active CommunityLLM Politically neutral LLM for real-time community meeting participation Active DirectDemocracyLLM Federated AI architecture for communities up to 15,000 Active SociologyLLM Fine-tuned sociological reasoning model Active GNO 31-domain planetary-scale human needs ontology Active DeepFlo 7-stage autonomous sociology research pipeline Active One World CSC Peer recovery support center Active

docs.title: How this site is organized
docs.text:
The navigation tabs at the top route to these sections:

Tab What lives here Organization Mission, values, governance, org-wide policies Projects AI Lab, Research Lab, and all active projects Infrastructure Tools, platforms, pipelines, and systems Guides Onboarding, how-to guides, and processes Roadmap Strategic plan and quarterly milestones Team Directory, roles, and how we work

If you cannot find what you need through navigation, use the search bar (top right) — it indexes every page on the site.

docs.title: Contributing to this documentation
docs.text:
Every page has a named owner responsible for keeping it accurate. If you find something wrong or missing:

  1. Fix it yourself — follow the contribution guide
  2. Open an issue — create a GitHub issue with the label documentation
  3. Ask for help — post in #docs-help
Maintained by OLS Documentation Team Platform MkDocs with Material theme Repository github.com/optimal-living-systems/docs License Apache 2.0
